heading: Effective date
label: 1825 Effective date
text: This subchapter shall come into force upon its approval or at the time proclaimed by the President for the Constitution of the Northern Mariana Islands to become effective, whichever is the later date.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to .section 1694d of this title

Effective Date of ConstitutionFor provisions of proclamation of President relating to effective date for Constitution of Northern Mariana Islands, see Proc. No. 4534, , 42 F.R. 56593, set out as a note under .Oct. 24, 1977section 1801 of this title
